title: Magic From The East
description: An add-on mod for Iron's Spell n' Spellbooks that adding new schools, spells and stuffs inspired from ancient Asian and Middle Eastern culture
body:
ABOUT THE MOD: This mod is an add-on mod for the mod Iron's Spells and Spellbooks which will adding new schools, spells and stuffs which inspired from the ancient culture and mythical of Asia and Middle East countries. Currently there are 2 new school which related features: Symmetry and Spirit.


FUTURE PLANS: 
- More spells
- More weapon and armor set
- Dune School
- 4th School (Top Secrect)
- Related mechanics
- Bosses
